---
title: "R Notebook for online course of Chuanpeng,Hu"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*.

```{r}
plot(cars)
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Cmd+Option+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Cmd+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.

# Chap-5

## 练习

```{r}
# 数据结构,将表格中的内容创建为数据框，并将第一列改为因子
gender_tmp <- c("男", "女", "女", "男")
gender <- factor(gender_tmp, levels = c("男", "女"))
score <- c(97, 99, 95, 96)
letter <- c("A", "A", "B", "B")
logic <- c("T", "F", "T", "F")
data <- data.frame(gender, score, letter, logic)
data
```

## 计算环境配置

```{r}
# 下载、导入所需的 R 包
if (!requireNamespace('pacman', quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages('pacman')
}

pacman::p_load(bruceR, tidyverse, here)
```

# 其他环境搭建

> 用于将 RMarkdown 文件编译成基于 Web 的幻灯片

```{r}
# 1. 安装 xaringan 和 辅助包
# xaringan 专门用于生成基于 Web 的幻灯片
pacman::p_load(xaringan, knitr, knitr, xfun)

# 2. 检查并确保 rmarkdown 也是最新版本
pacman::p_load(rmarkdown)

# 3. 手动编译 Rmd 文件
# 在 Console 中运行这行代码
# rmarkdown::render("path/to/你的文件名.Rmd")
```

## 读取数据

> 以 penguin 数据为例

```{r}
# 读取 penguin_rawdata.csv，注意编码
penguin_data <- bruceR::import(here::here('slides', 'data', 'penguin', 'penguin_rawdata.csv'), encoding = 'Latin-1')

# 使用基础包读取数据，同样注意编码
# penguin_data <- read.csv('.slides/data/penguin/penguin_rawdata_new.csv', fileEncoding = 'GBK')


```

## 查看数据

```{r}
# 查看数据
# View(penguin_data)

# 查看数据列名
colnames(penguin_data)

# 提取某列的数据，如提取 Site 这列的数据
print("打印 Site 的数据：")
penguin_data$Site
```

## 提取某 Site 的 Stree 列的数据

```{r}
# 使用 base::grepl 匹配字符串的某部分
site <- base::grepl("Tsinghua", (penguin_data$Site))
# 使用 base::startsWith 匹配字符串开头
stree_cols <- base::startsWith(c(colnames(penguin_data)), 'stress')
# 提取满足条件的 site 的 stree 数据
# 如提取所有 Tsinghua 的 stree 数据
stree_data <- penguin_data[site, stree_cols]
```
